title: eleocharis palustris subsp. minor
intro: Eleocharis palustris subsp. minor, also known as dwarf spike-rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family and is commonly found in wetlands and marshy areas. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Eleocharis palustris subsp. minor include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and respiratory issues.
